base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pickup_barrier_aura — a effect_layer (aura_vfx) from 1987 contra. B (barrier) power-up aura — rotating halo around player. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
